growth_records.medium: MMAB (minimal medium for A. brasilense) with 20 mM KNO3 as sole nitrogen source
growth_records.cite: Ganusova et al. The Azospirillum brasilense Core Chemotaxis Proteins CheA1 and CheA4 Link Chemotaxis Signaling with Nitrogen Metabolism. mSystems (2021). DOI:10.1128/mSystems.01354-20. [PMC8561660]
growth_records.snippet: TABLE 2 Effect of DeltacheA1, DeltacheA4, and DeltacheA1 DeltacheA4 deletions on the growth rate of A. brasilense in MMAB medium with potassium nitrate as a nitrogen source. Strain Sp7: Mean growth rate (h-1) +/- SEM = 0
growth_records.notes: Growth rate reported directly in Table 2 (mean +/- SEM of specific growth rate mu). Methods state: cells grown in MMAB to OD600=0.8, washed, rediluted to OD600=0.1 in MMAB with 20 mM KNO3, grown with shaking at 28C for 20 h with OD600 measured every 20 min; 'specific growth rate (mu) was calculated from five consecutive OD600 measurements (mu = delta-ln(OD600)/delta-t)'. doubling_time_h calculated here as ln2/mu = 0.693/0.115 = 6.03 h (not stated by authors, derived by us).

growth_records.medium: MMAB (minimal medium for A. brasilense) with 20 mM KNO3 as sole nitrogen source
growth_records.cite: Ganusova et al. The Azospirillum brasilense Core Chemotaxis Proteins CheA1 and CheA4 Link Chemotaxis Signaling with Nitrogen Metabolism. mSystems (2021). DOI:10.1128/mSystems.01354-20. [PMC8561660]
growth_records.snippet: TABLE 2 ... Strain DeltacheA1: Mean growth rate (h-1) +/- SEM = 0.172 +/- 0.006
growth_records.notes: Same assay/medium as the Sp7 WT record in this file (see that record's curation_notes for full method). doubling_time_h = ln2/mu = 0.693/0.172 = 4.03 h (derived by us).

growth_records.notes: Same assay/medium as the Sp7 WT record; strain additionally carries empty pBBR plasmid (antibiotic selection likely present, not specified per-strain in the table). doubling_time_h = ln2/mu = 0.693/0.053 = 13.08 h (derived by us).

growth_records.notes: Same assay/medium as the Sp7 WT record; cheA4 complemented in trans restores growth rate close to WT Sp7 (0.119 vs 0.115 h-1). doubling_time_h = ln2/mu = 0.693/0.119 = 5.83 h (derived by us).
